package.name: abb_irb14050_egm
package.description: ROS2 bridge between an ABB IRB 14050 (7-DOF) and ROS2 via the EGM protocol. Wraps the UDP dialog (EgmRobot feedback / EgmSensor correction) as a joint_states publisher and a joint_command subscriber. Also ships a teach/replay pair: teach reads positions via RWS while you jog with the FlexPendant, and waypoint_player replays them via EGM.
